params.name: Capricorn
params.description:
As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:
Heaven bestows talents in everyone's track; Lost fortunes can be reclaimed, it's a fact.

Eye of Fate organ skill, chance to trigger Fate Shackles +20%
Tail of Fate skill DMG +20%
Fateful Gaze organ skill, HP+50% after revival
